active_ingredients.name: Bispyribac Sodium
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: ALS inhibitor absorbed through leaves, stops amino acid synthesis in grassy weeds

active_ingredients.name: Bensulfuron Methyl
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: ALS inhibitor absorbed through roots and leaves, controls sedges and broadleaf weeds

mode_of_action_summary: Blocks ALS enzyme in weeds, stopping amino acid formation and cell division, leading to weed death in 7–14 days.
farmer_symptoms: گھاس فصل نوں دبا رہی اے
جڑی بوٹی بہت ہو گئی اے
دھان کمزور ہو گیا اے گھاس وجہ توں

weather_conditions.ideal_condition: Moist soil with no deep standing water

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Rotate with herbicides of different mode of action.

protective_measures: Avoid spray drift to nearby crops

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place

farmer_benefits: Controls grasses, sedges and broadleaf weeds in one spray
search_keywords: چوڑے پتوں والی جڑی بوٹی دی دوا
llm_usage_hint: Highlight correct timing, water management and single spray benefit.

master_descriptions.english: Winsta 30% WP is a selective post-emergence systemic herbicide for rice that controls grasses, sedges and broadleaf weeds by inhibiting the ALS enzyme.
master_descriptions.urdu: ونسٹا 30٪ ڈبلیو پی دھان کی فصل کے لیے ایک سلیکٹو پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار دوا ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: ونسٹا 30٪ ڈبلیو پی دھان لئی اک سلیکٹو پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار اے۔
